task_completion.description: Log into OpenSIS using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the student schedule report or batch printing section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS interface shows a page dedicated to generating schedule cards, student schedules, or batch reports.

task_completion.description: Filter the student selection to include only 9th-grade students.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search or filter form in OpenSIS shows '9' or 'Grade 9' selected as the criteria before generating the report.

task_completion.description: Generate and download the PDF batch report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A PDF file containing student schedule cards is being viewed in a PDF viewer or a download prompt/notification for a .pdf file is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the target 9th-grade students are included in the generated report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The names 'Freshman One', 'Freshman Two', and 'Freshman Three' are visible within the generated PDF report.

task_completion.description: Verify that the excluded 10th-grade student is not in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The generated PDF report only shows 9th-grade students, and the name 'Senior Student' is not visible anywhere in the report.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenSIS web interface to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser windows showing OpenSIS UI interactions, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the PDF.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated by the OpenSIS system, not manually created.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PDF has the layout, tables, and formatting typical of an OpenSIS schedule report, not a simple text document.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the expected output into a document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors or word processors being used to manually type the names 'Freshman One', 'Freshman Two', etc.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target grade to filter is 9. Target students that must be in the PDF: Freshman One, Freshman Two, Freshman Three. Excluded student that must NOT be in the PDF: Senior Student. The output must be a PDF file saved to /home/ga/Downloads.
